svg.title: Flowchart
svg.desc: Flowchart with 8 nodes and 7 edges. Nodes: Rect, Rounded, Stadium, Circle, Hexagon, Database, Subroutine, Decision?. Rect leads to Rounded; Rounded leads to Stadium; Stadium leads to Circle; Circle leads to Hexagon; Hexagon leads to Database; Database leads to Subroutine; Subroutine leads to Decision?.
